seoTitle: Carnham vs Caroona — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Carnham and Caroona. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Carnham and Caroona.
heading: Carnham vs Caroona — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Carnham, New South Wales and Caroona, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Carnham has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Caroona (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Carnham or Caroona safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Carnham has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Caroona scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Carnham scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Caroona scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Carnham or Caroona?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Carnham has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
